summary: Iteration 28: Product catalog testing complete. All 967 products across 13 divisions verified. Fixed brochure field mismatch bug (frontend/backend were checking 'brochure_url' but data has 'brochure' field). All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend UI working correctly with search, division filters, and brochure download.

issues: Products show 'Product Image Coming Soon' placeholder - no images uploaded for Variabilis products

test_credentials: No credentials needed for public page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product catalog fully functional with 967 products across 13 divisions. Variabilis products (78) imported with brochure links. Fixed brochure field mismatch - code now checks both 'brochure' and 'brochure_url' fields.

products_api.required_fields: PASS - division, category, id, product_name present

product_detail.brochure_button: PASS - Visible for products with brochure

brochure_field_mismatch.issue: Frontend checked for 'brochure_url' but Variabilis products have 'brochure' field
brochure_field_mismatch.backend_fix: Updated /api/brochure-download to check both fields and strip /api/files/ prefix from brochure path
